patients.focus: Longevity follow-up after sleep, resistance training, and omega-3 protocol.

measurements.title: Epigenetic Biological Age
measurements.interpretation: Younger than chronological age with moderate confidence and a favorable 6-month trend.

measurements.title: Pace of Aging
measurements.interpretation: Below reference pace. Good candidate for intervention-linked tracking.

measurements.title: hs-CRP
measurements.interpretation: Improved from prior draw, but still relevant for long-term intervention review.

measurements.title: Recovery Capacity (RMSSD)
measurements.interpretation: Wearable signal is improving, but still trails the favorable epigenetic trend.

timeline.title: TruDiagnostic follow-up uploaded
timeline.detail: New OMICmAge and DunedinPACE results normalized into the longitudinal record.

timeline.title: Resistance training block started
timeline.detail: 3x weekly plan, protein target raised, creatine added.

timeline.title: Sleep compression protocol retired
timeline.detail: Care plan shifted toward consistent wake time and late caffeine removal after HRV deterioration.

timeline.title: Quest inflammation panel parsed
timeline.detail: CRP, fasting insulin, ApoB, and CBC markers entered via document parser for baseline comparison.
